records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... a lifetime contract?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... a lifetime contract?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... a lifetime contract?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ah! I get it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ah! I get it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ah! I get it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're planning to eat me! To take my power!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're planning to eat me! To take my power!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're planning to eat me! To take my power!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Liar! You're a really weak human. You clearly want to be stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Liar! You're a really weak human. You clearly want to be stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Liar! You're a really weak human. You clearly want to be stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? We can get stronger without taking other's power? How does that work?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? We can get stronger without taking other's power? How does that work?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? We can get stronger without taking other's power? How does that work?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Help... each other? Business?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Help... each other? Business?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Help... each other? Business?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we really do that, we can both have power?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we really do that, we can both have power?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we really do that, we can both have power?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keeheehee, I'm actually not interested! I can steal the power of Counters as much as I want, even without you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keeheehee, I'm actually not interested! I can steal the power of Counters as much as I want, even without you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keeheehee, I'm actually not interested! I can steal the power of Counters as much as I want, even without you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I don't agree to help you, you're just going to keep getting in my way, right? I know that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I don't agree to help you, you're just going to keep getting in my way, right? I know that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I don't agree to help you, you're just going to keep getting in my way, right? I know that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone so weak, you're smart and annoying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone so weak, you're smart and annoying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone so weak, you're smart and annoying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, when I'm with you, humans don't attack me. Even up close, they don't run away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, when I'm with you, humans don't attack me. Even up close, they don't run away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, when I'm with you, humans don't attack me. Even up close, they don't run away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Following someone humans trust, like you, isn't great. But it's not entirely bad either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Following someone humans trust, like you, isn't great. But it's not entirely bad either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Following someone humans trust, like you, isn't great. But it's not entirely bad either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I want to try that out. Business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I want to try that out. Business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I want to try that out. Business.
